full_text:
Received a “small” piece of ovary tissue. It was hard and thick, homogeneous - all tumor. Removed capsule.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 mL DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µL Dispase + 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 mL DMEM/F12+++, 1 mL Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 10.13 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 1x 5.835 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 8.46 | 2.85
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 6.6 | 2.19
 | viability [%] | 78.1 | 76.7
 | size [µm] | 11.7 | 11.8
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 11.8 | 1.04
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 9.41 | 1.82
 | viability [%] | 79.7 | 75.3
 | size [µm] | 10.4 | 10.6
Average | [cells/ml] | 10.13 E6 | 1.945 E6
 | total [cells] | 30.39 E6 in 3 mL | 5.835 E6 in 3 ml
 | viability [%] | 78.9 | 76
